Regime-Specific Macro Themes
← Back to dashboard

Regime-Specific Macro Themes

CoT regime-specific macro themes: inflation, slowdown, supply stress, disinflation.

As of 2026-02-03

Gemini Summary

Signal Summary:

  • Configuration statement: Given Energy hedger long breadth of 21.4% and Ags hedger long breadth of 21.4%, this setup aligns with Upward-biased price paths and Elevated volatility, where the dominant risk is Regime shift, not Mean reversion.
  • The signal is currently classified under the Supply Stress regime due to physical market tightness flags (1).
  • Conviction Band: Medium; Interpretation Confidence: High Confidence; Internal Conflict Flag: No.

Methodology Applied:

  • Supply Stress: Triggered if hedger deep long share in Energy or Ags exceeds 0.20 (1).
  • Inflation Impulse: Requires Energy spec longs ≥ 0.40 and Metals spec longs ≥ 0.30, with corresponding producer hedging (1).
  • Global Slowdown: Triggered by Metals spec short share ≥ 0.35 and broad risk-off tone (1).
  • Data Freshness: Fresh (latest observation: 2026-02-03).

Key Dynamics:

  • Supply-side pressure is dominant as hedger long shares in Energy (21.4%) and Ags (21.4%) surpassed the 0.20 threshold (1).
  • Metals speculative crowding is high (40.0%), but Energy crowding (25.0%) is insufficient to confirm a broad Inflation Impulse (1).
  • Hedger activity in FX (35.7% deep short) suggests moderate currency-related hedging offsets against the commodity-linked stress (1).
  • Conditional Invalidation: Hedger long shares in both Energy and Ags falling below 0.20.

Scenario Balance:

  • Base case dominant: Persistent supply-side tightness maintains upward pressure on Energy and Agricultural assets.
  • Upside risk: Evolution into an Inflation Impulse if speculative energy participation rises above 40%.
  • Downside risk: Shift toward Global Slowdown if Metals speculative shorts exceed 35% amid broader risk-off sentiment.

Time Horizon & Aggregation:

  • Time Horizon: Tactical (weeks); provides guidance for short-term positioning based on weekly flow shifts.
  • Aggregation Weight Hint: Medium; serves as a narrative overlay that requires confirmation from realized price trends.

Macro Relevance:

  • Informs the Supply Stress dimension of global trade and commodity pricing.
  • Cycle position: Mid-to-late cycle expansion, often characterized by physical bottlenecks.
  • Typically acts as a precursor or companion to Inflation & Price Dynamics signals.

Data & References:

  • Primary dataset: CoT Sectoral Breadth and Macro Theme Flags, dated 2026-02-03 (1).
  • Most influential data: Hedger deep long shares in Energy and Ags.
  • Useful additions: Baltic Dry Index or Global Supply Chain Pressure Index (GSCPI) for physical verification.

Continuous macro theme intensity scores and heatmap.
